richemont.notes: FY26 (y/e 31 Mar 2026): sales €22,420m (+5% actual,+11% cc); op profit €4,492m (20.0% margin); profit €3,484m (+27%); net cash €8,496m; EPS €5.909. Ordinary div CHF3.30 (+10%) + special CHF1.00. New buyback (up to 10m A shares) launched 26 May 2026.
